title: Cabbage-lentil frikkadels
excerpt: Koos and I cooked together in our Crocs. There was nobody there to mock us over our Crocs. What a lovely, easy cook! Even if you're not vegetarian, I promise you'll definitely like these little frikkies. Sarietha, this one is for you and Josh.
html:
Koos and I cooked together in our Crocs. There was nobody there to mock us over our Crocs. What a lovely, easy cook! Even if you're not vegetarian, I promise you'll definitely like these little frikkies.

Sarietha, this one is for you and Josh.

steps: Put everything except the cabbage into a food processor and process until smooth.
Use an ice cream scoop and shape into balls.
Put the balls on a baking tray lined with baking paper, and place in the fridge.
Take the outer leaves of the cabbage. (Cut out the hard core in the middle.) Push them into boiling water to soften.
Now wrap each frikkadel in a cabbage leaf (you can secure it with a toothpick) and place it on top of the sauce (recipe below) that has been poured into an ovenproof dish.

directionGroups.title: Sauce for cabbage frikkies
steps: Fry the garlic and chillies together with the onion.
Add the rest of the ingredients and cook for 20 minutes.
Pour it into the bottom of an ovenproof dish and place the frikkadels on the sauce to cook through.
